summary: Phase 2 Loyalty Program overhaul testing COMPLETE. Fixed member detail bug (ID mismatch). All features verified: Admin Overview (gradient stats cards, tier distribution with emojis, points flow, earning rules), Rewards CRUD (AdminModal with violet header, all new fields: valid_from/to, max_redemptions, total_available, save loading spinner), Members (tier filter dropdown, search, clickable rows opening detail modal with transactions/redemptions).

issues: Tier symbol next to member name in table appears as generic trophy icon instead of tier-specific emoji - but emojis ARE present in tier filter dropdown and detail modal

admin_overview.stats_cards_gradients: PASS - Blue (Total Members), Amber (Points Issued), Emerald (Points Redeemed), Violet (Active Rewards)
admin_overview.tier_distribution_section: PASS - Shows 4 tier cards with emoji symbols, count, percentage bars
admin_overview.tier_symbols_guide: PASS - Shows 🥉🥈🥇💎 with tier names and point thresholds
admin_overview.points_flow_section: PASS - Shows Points Issued → Redeemed arrow flow + Outstanding balance
admin_overview.earning_rules_section: PASS - Every Booking, Write Reviews, Referrals rules displayed

rewards_crud.admin_modal_violet_header: PASS - Gradient from violet to purple for Create/Edit Reward modal
rewards_crud.points_eligibility_section: PASS - Points Required*, Minimum Tier dropdown with emoji
rewards_crud.availability_limits_section: PASS - Valid From, Valid To (date pickers), Max Redemptions per User, Total Available
rewards_crud.save_button_loading_spinner: PASS - Shows Loader2 icon during save
rewards_crud.rewards_cards_tier_border: PASS - Left border colored by tier (amber for bronze)

members_tab.table_with_tier_badges: PASS - Member rows show tier badges (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum)
members_tab.clickable_rows: PASS - Clicking row opens member detail modal
members_tab.member_detail_modal_blue_header: PASS - AdminModal with blue gradient header
members_tab.tier_card_with_joined_date: PASS - Shows emoji, tier name, joined date, total points
members_tab.point_activity_transactions: PASS - Shows earn/redeem transactions with description, date, points

backend_apis.POST_rewards_new_fields: PASS - Accepts service_types, valid_from, valid_to, max_redemptions, total_available
backend_apis.GET_member_detail: PASS - Returns user info, program, transactions, redemptions

bugs_fixed.issue: Member list returned loyalty program ID instead of user ID, causing member detail API to fail
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed 'id': prog.get('_id') or prog.get('user_id') to 'id': prog.get('user_id')

critical_code_review_comments: Member ID fix was critical for proper detail modal functionality - backend was returning loyalty_program._id instead of user_id
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Loyalty features complete. Fixed member ID bug in /admin/members endpoint. All 3 tabs (Overview, Rewards, Members) working. Create Reward modal has all new fields. Member detail modal shows transactions. Customer user ID: e31df4e5-c8b8-4701-83ea-66a6b3cebbab has 2 transactions (2000+1500 pts).
